name: Anti-Slop Contract
description: Rejects generic AI design patterns that look polished but lack product-specific judgment.

rules.check: copy must avoid generic SaaS verbs and empty superlatives
metrics must be real, sourced, or omitted
layout must avoid default centered hero plus three equal cards unless the profile explicitly allows it
visual complexity must serve hierarchy, proof, or interaction
page must include concrete artifacts, screenshots, commands, product surfaces, or source-backed evidence

remediation: Replace generic claims with product-specific evidence, varied section rhythm, explicit constraints, real screenshots, real commands, and source-backed design decisions.
